prompt: A Parisian cobblestone street with classic Haussmann buildings. A corner cafe with iron bistro tables and chairs under a striped awning, potted flowers at the entrance. The Eiffel Tower faintly visible in the far background. Pencil sketch style with elegant detailed line work and crosshatching. Off-screen to the left: a boulangerie with a bread display window and a green Art Nouveau Metro entrance. Off-screen to the right: a bookshop with outdoor shelves (bouquiniste) and a vintage lamp post with a flower basket. First-person viewer. First-person perspective, eye-level, looking straight ahead down the cobblestone street.

scene_adherence.visible_part: A Parisian cobblestone street is lined with classic Haussmann buildings. A corner cafe with iron bistro tables and chairs sits under a striped awning, with potted flowers at its entrance. The Eiffel Tower is faintly visible in the far background. The scene is rendered in a pencil sketch style with elegant detailed line work and crosshatching.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: Off-screen to the left, there is a boulangerie with a bread display window and a green Art Nouveau Metro entrance. Off-screen to the right, there is a bookshop with outdoor shelves (bouquiniste) and a vintage lamp post with a flower basket.
